attributes.Sql Query:
select 
 BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DEPARTMENT_ID
,SK_THEATER_ID_INT
,DEPARTMENT_SHORT_ID
,DEPARTMENT_DESCR
,DEPARTMENT_SHORT_DESCR
,FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_DESCR
,FIN_COMPANY_NAME
, L15_NODE_ID
, L15_DESC
, L14_NODE_ID
, L14_DESC
, L13_NODE_ID
, L13_DESC
, L12_NODE_ID
, L12_DESC
, L11_NODE_ID
, L11_DESC
,L10_NODE_ID
,L10_DESC
, L9_NODE_ID
,L9_DESC
,L8_NODE_ID
,L8_DESC
,L7_NODE_ID
,L7_DESC
,L6_NODE_ID
,L6_DESC
,L5_NODE_ID
,L5_DESC
,L4_NODE_ID
,L4_DESC
,L3_NODE_ID
,L3_DESC
,L2_NODE_ID
,L2_DESC
,L1_NODE_ID
,L1_DESC
,HIERARCHY_TYPE
from
(
SELECT  
NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE  DEPARTMENT_ID
, NFT.SK_THEATER_ID_INT
,NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE DEPARTMENT_SHORT_ID
,(CASE WHEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'P'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
END)   DEPARTMENT_DESCR
,(CASE WHEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
END)   DEPARTMENT_SHORT_DESCR
,NFML.FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_DESCR
,NFC.FIN_COMPANY_NAME
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT)  L15_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,1,130) 
END) L15_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT) L14_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL14_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL14_NAME,1,130) 
END) L14_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT) L13_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL13_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL13_NAME,1,130) 
END) L13_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT) L12_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL12_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL12_NAME,1,130) 
END) L12_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT) L11_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL11_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL11_NAME,1,130)

,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL10_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL10_NAME,1,130) 
END) L10_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT) L9_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,1,130)

,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT) L8_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,1,130) 
END) L8_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT) L7_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME,1,130) 
END) L7_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT) L6_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,1,130)

,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT) L5_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,1,130) 
END) L5_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT) L4_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME,1,130) 
END) L4_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT) L3_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,1,130) 
END) L3_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT) L2_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,1,130) 
END) L2_DESC
,ABS(RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT) L1_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'||SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('P'|| RPH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME,1,130) 
END) L1_DESC
,'P' as HIERARCHY_TYPE
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_TV  NFML,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_THEATER_TV NFT
WHERE 
NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE          =  RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE =  RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
AND NFD.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID =  NFML.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID
AND NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE          = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATER_NAME_CODE = NFT.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATER_NAME_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NFT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NFML.END_TV_DT = '3500-01-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT  
NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE  DEPARTMENT_ID
, NFT.SK_THEATER_ID_INT
,NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE DEPARTMENT_SHORT_ID
,(CASE WHEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'M'||NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
END) DEPARTMENT_DESCR
,(CASE WHEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
WHEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
END) DEPARTMENT_SHORT_DESCR
,NFML.FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_DESCR
,NFC.FIN_COMPANY_NAME
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT)  L15_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,1,130) 
END) L15_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT) L14_NODE_ID

THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL14_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE),4,1) <> '_'

THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL13_NAME,1,130)

THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL11_NAME,1,130)

THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL10_NAME,1,130)

,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,1,130) 
END) L9_DESC

,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,1,130) 
END) L8_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT) L7_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL07_NAME,1,130) 
END) L7_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT) L6_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,1,130) 
END) L6_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT) L5_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,1,130) 
END) L5_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT) L4_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL04_NAME,1,130) 
END) L4_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT) L3_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,1,130) 
END) L3_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT) L2_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,1,130) 
END) L2_DESC
,ABS(RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT) L1_NODE_ID
,(CASE WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),4,1)='_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'||SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),1,3) || SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),5) ||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME,1,130) 
WHEN RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT IS NOT NULL and SUBSTR(trim(RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE),4,1) <> '_' 
THEN SUBSTR('M'|| RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE ||' '||NODE_LEVEL01_NAME,1,130) 
END) L1_DESC
,'M' as HIERARCHY_TYPE
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_TV  NFML,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_THEATER_TV NFT        
WHERE 
NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE          =  RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE =  RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
AND NFD.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID =  NFML.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID
AND NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE          = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATER_NAME_CODE = NFT.BK_FINANCIAL_THEATER_NAME_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NFT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NFML.END_TV_DT = '3500-01-01'
) SVED
where ( SVED.BK_COMPANY_CODE, SVED.DEPARTMENT_SHORT_ID, SVED.HIERARCHY_TYPE) 
    NOT IN ( SELECT BK_COMPANY_CD ,DEPARTMENT_SHORT_ID, HIERARCHY_TYPE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EIS_DEPARTMENT )
